archetype_description: Strong in one-day races and sprint-accessible opportunities, with limited GC emphasis.
profile_rationale: The saved 2026 artifact mix is strongest where one-day and sprint-accessible opportunities overlap.
Stage-race upside is still real, but it looks more opportunistic than GC-led in the current local data.
This custom weight mix gives Cofidis a sharper top-tier planning identity than the default balanced profile.
